notes: UI polish round. PLAY: MP/SP soon-pages stripped to 'Coming soon.', BACK button is now chunky and obvious, Practice dropped the placeholder MP card, clicking PLAY in nav while in Practice now resets to mode-pick hub. PULSE icon fixed (was invisible — self-intersecting polygon). STATS rewritten with 6 lifetime tiles (added LEVEL / WIN RATE / STREAK) and proper match cards (verdict strip, mode + difficulty chips, K/D block, relative time) in a scrollable list. QUESTS rewritten with DAILY / ACHIEVEMENTS pill tabs — Daily card has reward chip + gradient progress bar; Achievements grid previews 6 locked categories. Sidebar profile redesigned: cut chevron corner, animated scanlines, perspective rays + scan beam on showcase, rotating orbit ring around avatar, chevron rank badge, gradient XP fill, LIVE pulsing pill.
